payload.long_description: Close-up of a white circular analog wall clock with black Roman numerals and thin black hands set in a reflective scalloped chrome metal frame; the bottom-right portion of the clock is edge-cropped and slightly blurred — estimated diameter ~25–30 cm and distance from camera ~0.6 m.
